programme.title: Young Guns II
programme.desc: En route to Mexico from the United States, Billy the Kid (Emilio Estevez) and his associates are pursued by federal agents hell-bent on bringing them to justice. But when Billy, Doc (Kiefer Sutherland) and Chavez (Lou Diamond Phillips) prove too difficult to track down, the frustrated authorities enlist an old friend of theirs, reformed outlaw Pat Garrett (William Petersen), to take down the elusive gunslinger. But Billy has a head start, and his crew of outlaws is growing by the minute.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Judge Dredd
programme.desc: In the crime-plagued future, the only thing standing between order and chaos is Judge Joseph Dredd (Sylvester Stallone). His duty: police the violent metropolitan sprawls that crowd the decaying earth, and kill criminals on the spot if necessary. The tables are turned, however, when maniacal ex-Judge Rico (Armand Assante) frames Dredd for murder. But, as his opponents soon discover, not even a prison sentence can stop Dredd from doling out his signature brand of justice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the murder of an actress to a member of her therapy group, then focus their attention on a Tony-winning songwriter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a fire that ripped through a 300-plus audience at a rock concert, killing 23 fans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An unemployed executive deposits $400,000 in his savings account before being gunned down in his upscale brownstone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives attempt to identify a body that was found floating in the Hudson River; after the victim is identified, her husband becomes the prime suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A war correspondent who reputedly endangered U.S. troops in Iraq gets shot in the back with a military-issue handgun.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the poisoning death of a grief counselor who claimed to communicate with the dead in order to comfort clients.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the owner of a clothing company is beaten to death in his office, Briscoe and Green believe the prime suspect entered the factory just before the murder.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Reporter Stooges nab a phony noble.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team confronts a greedy towing-service operator (Don Stroud) pressuring a one-truck competitor to fold.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team battles a garbage-disposal company sabotaging its competitor and dumping toxic waste into city sewers.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A lovely veterinarian (Wendy Fulton) saves Murdock after bounty hunters kidnap him; guest Bill McKinney.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Murdock takes up painting and Face becomes a critic to bust a ring of Beverly Hills art thieves; guests Lloyd Bochner, Dennis Franz.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A saboteur attempts to put two sisters (Suzanne Barnes, Claudia Christian) out of the soda business.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: During a mountain holiday, the team is caught between robbers and the pursuing Army; guests Ken Swofford, Kristen Meadows.

programme.title: Judge Dredd
programme.desc: In the crime-plagued future, the only thing standing between order and chaos is Judge Joseph Dredd (Sylvester Stallone). His duty: police the violent metropolitan sprawls that crowd the decaying earth, and kill criminals on the spot if necessary. The tables are turned, however, when maniacal ex-Judge Rico (Armand Assante) frames Dredd for murder. But, as his opponents soon discover, not even a prison sentence can stop Dredd from doling out his signature brand of justice.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: As Hotch fights for his life after being stabbed, he has visions of his late wife and his nemesis; when a teen goes missing, suspicions arise about her estranged father.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Ritualistic murders lead the team to believe their suspect may have a fascination with the Salem witch trials; Garcia plans a Day of the Dead celebration.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A series of strangulations leads the team to look for a killer who keeps mementos of his victims; Rossi's favorite bar is in danger of closing.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team searches for missing teens who are suspects in a series of mass murders in Chicago.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When skeletons are discovered in the backyard of a home in Virginia, family secrets and past racial divisions are brought to light.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When a young boy disappears from his home in St. Louis, the team examines a similar cold case for clues.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: Blake must work with her retired police captain father and her detective brother to solve a series of murders in Kansas City.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef exists in nutrient-poor waters, in spite of its immense size.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties
programme.desc: A colony of emperor penguins arrive in Atka Bay, after three months at sea, to raise their chicks through the coming winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties
programme.desc: A group of chimps in Senegal is led by an alpha male named Dave.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties
programme.desc: Tigress Raj Bhera has four new cubs whom she must protect while battling rivals who want to steal her lands and overthrow her.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties
programme.desc: The leader of a great Painted Wolf family is growing old and her power to keep the peace is waning; a feud with an ambitious daughter threatens to bring the dynasty down.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Dynasties
programme.desc: The leader of a once mighty lion pride must now battle for their very survival; a look at whether or not this extraordinary lioness can save her family from disaster.

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle. When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander to save the hunters from the hunted.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) is doing hard time in jail when his former boss, Col. Trautman (Richard Crenna), offers him a deal. If Rambo travels to Vietnam to try to find the American prisoners of war, his criminal record will be expunged. Rambo takes the reconnaissance assignment and agrees not to get involved in any of the action. However, when his Vietnamese lover, Co Bao (Julia Nickson), is killed by American forces, Rambo forgets his promise and takes matters into his own hands.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Reluctant one-man army Rambo goes into action against Soviet invaders in Afghanistan. Sought out in a Buddhist monastery retreat, Rambo declines his former commander's request for help to deliver missiles to the mujahideen, but when his superior is captured and imprisoned, the hulking hero brings out the big guns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
